summary: Tested WhatsApp 'Send to Group' feature across backend APIs and frontend components. Backend APIs working correctly. Frontend Group buttons verified in SaleBook, Reports/Daily, Payments (Truck Payment, Truck Owner), and Paddy Purchase. CashBook Group button works when party is filtered. Ledgers component with party-ledger-send-to-group button is NOT integrated into the app (imported but not rendered).

ui_bugs.issue: Ledgers component is imported in App.js but never rendered. The party-ledger-send-to-group button exists in code but is not accessible in UI.

action_items: Ledgers component (Ledgers.jsx) is imported but not rendered in App.js. Either integrate it into the app or remove the party-ledger-send-to-group button from the test requirements.
critical_code_review_comments: Ledgers.jsx is imported at line 61 of App.js but never used - dead code or missing integration
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp Group Send feature tested. Backend APIs (GET /api/whatsapp/groups, POST /api/whatsapp/send-group) working. Frontend Group buttons verified in: SaleBook (sv-group-*), Reports/Daily (daily-send-to-group), Payments/Truck Payment (truck-group-*), Payments/Truck Owner (owner-group-*), Paddy Purchase (paddy-group-*), CashBook (cashbook-send-to-group when party filtered). Ledgers component not integrated - party-ledger-send-to-group button not accessible. Leased Truck has no data so lease-group-* buttons not visible.

backend_apis.POST /api/whatsapp/send-group with valid: PASS - Returns {success: true, message: 'Group message bhej diya!'}
backend_apis.POST /api/whatsapp/send-group without te: PASS - Returns 400 with 'Text ya media URL required'

frontend_buttons.cashbook-send-to-group: PASS - Visible when party is filtered in CashBook
frontend_buttons.party-ledger-send-to-group: FAIL - Ledgers component not rendered in app
frontend_buttons.sv-group-*: PASS - Per-voucher Group buttons in SaleBook
frontend_buttons.paddy-group-*: PASS - Per-item Group buttons in Paddy Purchase (when balance > 0)
frontend_buttons.lease-group-*: NOT TESTED - No leased truck data available
frontend_buttons.truck-group-*: PASS - Per-truck Group buttons in Payments/Truck Payment
frontend_buttons.owner-group-*: PASS - Per-owner Group buttons in Payments/Truck Owner

verified_features.send_to_group_dialog: PASS - Opens correctly with group selector and send button
